---
description: "Explain what a thinkScript study/strategy does, line by line, including assumptions and edge cases."
name: "ThinkScript Explain"
argument-hint: "Paste thinkScript code to explain."
agent: "ask"
---
Explain the supplied thinkScript code clearly and concisely.

Output format:
1. Purpose summary (2-4 lines)
2. Step-by-step logic walkthrough
3. Inputs and tunable parameters
4. Potential pitfalls and edge cases
5. Optional improvements (without changing behavior)

Keep the explanation focused on thinkScript semantics, not generic coding advice.
